title: Add New Developer Tools
description: Implement support for 30+ new developer tools discovered through research of popular Homebrew formulas, DevOps tools, database CLIs, code quality tools, security utilities, and modern CLI alternatives
acceptance_criteria: All tools use define_tool! macro where possible
Each tool has cross-platform support (macOS, Linux, Windows where available)
All tools compile and pass basic tests
Tools are auto-registered via inventory crate

batches.title: Modern CLI Utilities (Tier 1)
batches.description: Essential modern CLI tools that every developer should have

tools.name: fzf
tools.description: Command-line fuzzy finder for files, history, processes

tools.name: bat
tools.description: Cat clone with syntax highlighting and Git integration

tools.name: fd
tools.description: Fast and user-friendly alternative to find

tools.name: eza
tools.description: Modern ls replacement with colors, icons, and Git awareness

tools.name: zoxide
tools.description: Smarter cd command that learns your navigation patterns

tools.name: delta
tools.description: Syntax-highlighting pager for git diff output

tools.name: lazygit
tools.description: Simple terminal UI for git commands

tools.name: starship
tools.description: Minimal, fast, customizable shell prompt

batches.title: GitHub and Git Tools
batches.description: Tools for GitHub workflows and Git productivity

tools.name: gh
tools.description: GitHub's official CLI for PRs, issues, and repos

tools.name: direnv
tools.description: Directory-specific environment variables via .envrc

batches.title: Kubernetes and DevOps Tools
batches.description: Essential tools for Kubernetes and cloud workflows

tools.name: kubectl
tools.description: Official Kubernetes command-line tool

tools.name: helm
tools.description: Package manager for Kubernetes applications

tools.name: k9s
tools.description: Terminal UI for Kubernetes cluster management

tools.name: kind
tools.description: Run local Kubernetes clusters using Docker

tools.name: minikube
tools.description: Local Kubernetes cluster for development

tools.name: kubectx
tools.description: Fast Kubernetes context and namespace switching

tools.name: kustomize
tools.description: Kubernetes YAML customization without templates

tools.name: argocd
tools.description: GitOps continuous delivery for Kubernetes

tools.name: psql
tools.description: PostgreSQL command-line client

tools.name: mysql
tools.description: MySQL command-line client

tools.name: redis
tools.description: Redis server and CLI tools

tools.name: mongosh
tools.description: Modern MongoDB Shell

tools.name: sqlite
tools.description: SQLite database and CLI

batches.title: Code Quality and Linting Tools
batches.description: Linters and formatters for code quality

tools.name: shellcheck
tools.description: Static analysis for shell scripts

tools.name: shfmt
tools.description: Shell script formatter

tools.name: hadolint
tools.description: Dockerfile linter with best practices

tools.name: ruff
tools.description: Extremely fast Python linter and formatter

tools.name: yamllint
tools.description: YAML linter for syntax and style

tools.name: actionlint
tools.description: Static checker for GitHub Actions workflows

batches.title: HTTP and Network Tools
batches.description: Tools for API testing and network operations

tools.name: curl
tools.description: Command-line tool for URL data transfer

tools.name: httpie
tools.description: User-friendly HTTP client with JSON support

tools.name: nmap
tools.description: Network discovery and security scanner

batches.title: Security and Secrets Tools
batches.description: Tools for security scanning and secrets management

tools.name: trivy
tools.description: Vulnerability scanner for containers and repos

tools.name: age
tools.description: Simple, modern file encryption tool

tools.name: sops
tools.description: Encrypted file editor for secrets in Git

implementation_notes.simple_tools: Use define_tool! macro with standard package manager installs
custom_install_tools: argocd - requires curl binary download on Linux
mongosh - requires MongoDB apt repo setup
ruff - astral.sh install script on Linux
windows_limitations: redis - no official Windows support, skip or note WSL
some tools may need manual binary downloads

risks.description: Package names may change between distro versions
risks.mitigation: Test on multiple distributions in CI

risks.description: Custom install tools may have breaking changes
risks.mitigation: Pin versions in install scripts where possible
